articles.title: Kenyan Runner Makes History by Running a Marathon in Under Two Hours
articles.summary: Sabastian Sawe, a runner from Kenya, made history by finishing the London Marathon in 1 hour, 59 minutes, and 30 seconds. This is the first time anyone has run a marathon in under two hours during a race. A marathon is a very long race, about 26 miles. Sawe ran faster than the old record of 2 hours and 35 seconds. Another runner, Yomif Kejelcha, also finished in under two hours, coming in second place. Sawe said he felt strong and happy. In the women's race, Tigst Assefa from Ethiopia also set a new world record. The London Marathon is a big event where runners from all over the world compete.

articles.title: Prices Might Go Up for a Long Time After War
articles.summary: A war between the US, Israel, and Iran is causing problems around the world. The UK government says that because of the war, prices for energy, food, and flights could stay high for at least eight months after the war ends. Energy production and shipping in the Middle East have slowed down or stopped, which makes things more expensive. The government is making plans to help with shortages of food and fuel. They are meeting twice a week to check on supplies. The UK is not fighting in the war, but it is still affected. The government wants people to keep using cars and petrol as usual and not to change their travel plans. They think there might be higher prices, but not empty shelves in shops. The war started because of actions by Donald Trump. The UK is trying to protect its economy and people from the effects of the war.

articles.title: Gunfire at a Big Dinner Party
articles.summary: President Donald Trump was at a big dinner party in a hotel. Suddenly, someone started shooting. Secret Service agents quickly took the President to a safe place. Many important people were at the dinner, like the Vice President and journalists. The police caught a man named Cole Tomas Allen. He was staying at the hotel and had guns and knives. One security agent got hurt and went to the hospital. The dinner was for reporters who cover the White House. Everyone was scared, but the President was safe. The police are still investigating why the man did this.

articles.title: Man Arrested Near White House Dinner
articles.summary: A man was arrested after firing shots at a hotel in Washington D.C. The hotel was holding a big dinner for reporters who cover the White House. The man's name is Cole Tomas Allen, and he is 31 years old. He is from California. Police say he had a shotgun, a handgun, and knives. He told police he wanted to shoot officials from the Trump administration. No one was hurt, and the man was taken to the hospital for a check-up. Police believe he acted alone. The man was a guest at the hotel. He will be charged with using a gun during a crime and attacking a federal officer. This happened on a Saturday night. The dinner is called the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

articles.title: Doctors Warn About Tick Bites This Year
articles.summary: Ticks are tiny bugs that can bite people and make them sick. Doctors are worried that this year might be a bad year for tick bites. Many people are already getting bitten by ticks. The CDC, which is a group that helps keep people healthy, told everyone to be careful. Tick bites usually happen a lot in May, but this year they are happening earlier. Doctors say that if more people get bitten, more people might get sick. Not all tick bites make you sick, but some can cause diseases like Lyme disease. It is important to check for ticks after playing outside. You can also wear long sleeves and use bug spray to keep ticks away. If you find a tick on you, ask a grown-up to help remove it carefully.

articles.title: What to Know If Your Flight Is Canceled
articles.summary: Airlines around the world are canceling flights because the war in the Middle East is making jet fuel more expensive. This is happening as summer begins, when many people want to travel. If your flight is canceled, you might have time to make new plans because the airlines cancel early. You should check the airline's app or website to book a new flight. For U.S. airlines, this is the fastest way. For other airlines, you may need to call or go to the airport. The article helps travelers understand what to do when flights are canceled.
